no:
AutoDescription v0.9.37 by Selphira. Scans ALL items and spells and regenerates their technical descriptions to match actual in-game stats. Adapts to all installed mods. MUST install after ALL content mods — the very last mod before EET_End. Warning: uses ~10GB RAM on large installs. cn:20/25 use ACTION_READLN (manual input required).
REMOVED FROM ULTIMATE PRESET — takes 60+ min on a full install (processes thousands of ITM/SPL files with 8+ GC cycles at 2GB+). Can be installed manually post-install at leisure. Recommended as an overnight manual install for large mod lists.
sum: Automatically generates item and spell descriptions with standardized technical text reflecting actual in-game stats, adapting to any installed mods.

co.n: Standardize item descriptions of a mod
co.tp2n: Uniformisation des descriptions des objets d'un mod
co.no: ACTION_READLN: prompts for mod folder name. Not suitable for automated install

in.t: Uses ACTION_READLN for mod folder name. Requires manual input.

co.n: Uniformisation des descriptions des sortilèges d'un mod
co.tp2n: Uniformisation des descriptions des sortilèges d'un mod
co.no: ACTION_READLN: prompts for mod folder name. Not suitable for automated install

in.t: Uses ACTION_READLN for mod folder name. Requires manual input.
